title: Match Queries - find matches by team, date range, competition, season
evidence: internal/mcp/tools.go:14-63 find_matches tool with filters: team, vs_team, competition, season, from, to, limit

title: Team Queries - match history and statistics (wins, losses, draws, goals)
evidence: internal/mcp/tools.go:65-94 team_stats tool, internal/query/team.go ComputeTeamStats function

title: Player Queries - search by name, nationality, club, position, min_overall
evidence: internal/mcp/tools.go:157-192 find_players tool, internal/query/player.go FindPlayers function

title: Competition Queries - standings by season computed from match results
evidence: internal/mcp/tools.go:122-155 standings tool, internal/query/stats.go Standings function

title: Statistical Analysis - head-to-head, overall stats, biggest wins
All 6 CSV files are loadable and queryable
evidence: internal/data/load.go:14-40 specs list all 6 files, data/kaggle/ contains: Brasileirao_Matches.csv, Brazilian_Cup_Matches.csv, Libertadores_Matches.csv, BR-Football-Dataset.csv, novo_campeonato_brasileiro.csv, fifa_data.csv

title: Team name normalization handles variations
evidence: internal/data/normalize.go implements NormalizeTeam function, internal/query/match.go:38-41 uses data.TeamMatches for flexible matching

title: Properly formatted responses from all tools
evidence: internal/mcp/format.go contains FormatMatches, FormatTeamStats, FormatH2H, FormatStandings, FormatPlayers, FormatOverall functions

title: Performance requirements not tested - simple lookups should respond in < 2 seconds
evidence: No benchmark tests or performance tests found in test suite. Unit tests pass but no load/performance validation.
suggestion: Add benchmark tests for find_matches and find_players with real dataset to verify < 2s response times

title: Aggregate query performance not tested - should respond in < 5 seconds
evidence: No benchmark tests. standings and overall_stats are implemented but performance not verified against full 6-dataset aggregation.
suggestion: Add benchmark tests for Standings and Overall statistics with full match dataset

title: Sample question coverage not tested - specification requires 20+ answerable questions
evidence: Only unit tests testing individual functions exist. No end-to-end test with 20 representative queries from spec (e.g. 'Show me all Flamengo vs Fluminense matches', 'Which team scored most goals in 2023?')
suggestion: Add integration test with 20+ natural language queries from TASK.md section and verify accurate answers

title: Cross-file queries partially implemented
evidence: find_players and find_matches tools exist independently. No tool directly joins player data with match data (e.g., find all matches of players from a specific club, or players who scored in a match).
suggestion: Add a tool that correlates players with their match performance or team membership across datasets

title: No architecture documentation in codebase
evidence: No README explaining MCP server structure, tool architecture, or query flow. Only CLAUDE.md template present.
suggestion: Add README.md describing MCP server design, tool interfaces, query execution flow, and data loading pipeline

title: All unit tests passing
evidence: go test ./... output: 11 tests across 4 packages all PASS. Packages: cmd/brsoccer-mcp (no tests), internal/data (2 tests), internal/mcp (4 tests), internal/query (7 tests)

title: No linting issues detected
evidence: go vet ./... output clean (no warnings or errors)
